chemical_id.description: Stable chemical identifier shared with the request.
chemical_id.title: Chemical Id

preferred_name.description: Preferred chemical name when the SCCS source is already tied to identity.
preferred_name.title: Preferred Name

cosmeticProductType.description: Cosmetic product type label from SCCS guidance, for example face cream.
cosmeticProductType.title: Cosmeticproducttype

productFamily.description: Optional broader SCCS product family such as skin_care or hair_care.
productFamily.title: Productfamily

tableReferences.description: Notes of Guidance table or section references backing the record.
tableReferences.title: Tablereferences

supportedRoutes.description: Routes explicitly supported by the cited SCCS guidance context.
supportedRoutes.title: Supportedroutes

physical_forms.description: Physical forms supported by the SCCS source.
physical_forms.title: Physical Forms

application_methods.description: Application methods supported by the SCCS source.
application_methods.title: Application Methods

retention_types.description: Retention or contact semantics supported by the SCCS source.
retention_types.title: Retention Types

productUseProfileOverrides.description: Reviewed product-use profile fields such as use_amount_per_event, use_amount_unit, or use_events_per_day.
productUseProfileOverrides.title: Productuseprofileoverrides

populationProfileOverrides.description: Reviewed population-profile fields such as exposed_surface_area_cm2 or body_weight_kg.
populationProfileOverrides.title: Populationprofileoverrides

region_scopes.description: Regions where the SCCS evidence is considered applicable.
region_scopes.title: Region Scopes

jurisdictions.description: Jurisdictions or programs where the SCCS evidence is relevant.
jurisdictions.title: Jurisdictions

evidence_sources.description: Stable upstream evidence references backing the SCCS record.
evidence_sources.title: Evidence Sources

notes.description: Additional notes preserved from the SCCS source.
notes.title: Notes
